title: Peppercorn Pilaf
description: A low-carb-friendly and nostalgic Australian dish featuring peppercorns for a unique and flavorful twist.

ingredients.name: Black peppercorns, crushed (about 30-40 whole peppercorns)
ingredients.notes: crushed for easier cooking and flavor extraction

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add half of the butter and swirl to coat.
Add minced garlic, cumin, salt, and crushed peppercorns. Stir until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Pour in rinsed quinoa and stir well to combine with aromatics. Let cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Stir in remaining butter and parsley. Reduce heat to low and cover the skillet. Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until liquid is absorbed and quinoa is tender.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork before serving.
